name: Pasta with Chicken and Grilled Veggies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boned and skinned chicken breast halves
6 halves sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, drained, coarsely chopped
1 cup Romano or Parmesan cheese, shredded or grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta al dente. Keep it hot in the water.
2. Lightly oil a grill pan or outdoor grill. Grill chicken, eggplant, mushrooms, and roma tomatoes over medium heat until done. Do not cook the tomato skin, as this will cause juice loss. Eggplant should be soft, while tomatoes are hot and lightly charred. Mushrooms and chicken should be cooked through.
3. Cut chicken and eggplant into bite-sized pieces. Slice portobello mushrooms. If the mushrooms are large, you may need to halve them before grilling. Slice roma tomatoes into two or four pieces, saving some juice.
4. Drain the pasta and toss with several drizzles of olive oil, garlic, basil, coarsely chopped sundried tomatoes, and 1/4 cup cheese. Add chicken and grilled vegetables, tossing again to combine.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve hot with the remaining cheese.
